mapper.update: update CustomizeVocabularyTable set vContent=#{vContent}, vZh_meaning=#{}, lDate=#{} where cId=#{cId} and nId=#{nId};
mapper.delete: delete from CustomizeVocabularyTable where cId=#{cId} and nId=#{nId};
mapper.select: select cId, vContent, vZh_meaning, nId, lDate, EXP(-0.8 * DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), lDate)) as retention_value from CustomizeVocabularyTable where nId = #{nId} order by retention_value asc;

select cId, vContent, vZh_meaning, nId, lDate, EXP(-0.8 * DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), lDate)) as retention_value from CustomizeVocabularyTable where EXP(-0.8 * DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), lDate)) < 0.4 and nId = #{nId} order by retention_value asc limit 1;
